name: Workers comp vs suing my boss after injury, which in Utah?
description: File workers' comp (no-fault, covers basics); suing employer rare.[1][6]

mainEntity.name: Workers comp vs suing my boss after injury, which in Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: File workers' comp (no-fault, covers basics); suing employer rare.[1][6]
acceptedAnswer.description: Workers' comp is primary no-fault path for medical/wages; suing employer barred unless gross negligence (rare).[1][6] Third-party suits possible if others at fault.[4] Key factors: Prove negligence for suit (hard); comp faster/surer. Practical guidance: File comp first; explore third-party if applicable. Comp exclusive remedy usually.[6] Choose comp for most cases.[1]
